instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Why should newlyweds invest in ULIP?
Got married?
Congratulations!
You have crossed an important milestone in your life. Now, as you settle down with your better half, not only will your life change, but your finances will undergo a major change too.
After marriage, responsibilities increase. If your spouse is non-working, they depend on you financially. You need to provide for their lifestyle expenses. Moreover, your collective financial goals also increase. You start planning for a child, might want to move into your own home, might upgrade your vehicle and so on.
As such, post-marriage, you need to make fresh investments to supplement your savings for your enhanced goals. This is where a ULIP plan comes into the picture.
Why investing in ULIPs is beneficial for newlyweds?
There are various reasons why ULIPs make a good investment choice for newlyweds. Have a look –
To save for long-term financial goals:
Planning for a child, upbringing, education, moving into a new home, buying a bigger car, etc., are some financial goals that might arise after marriage. Planning for these goals can help you create the desired corpus, even with limited savings.
ULIPs provide you with an avenue to save for these goals effectively. You can opt for long-term investment tenures and build up a corpus for your long-term goals.
To accumulate a suitable corpus with good returns:
ULIPs are market-linked investment avenues that have the potential to generate good returns with time. As such, when you invest in ULIPs, you can earn returns, compound them over time and accumulate a suitable corpus for your goals.
You can use the ULIP calculator to estimate the conservative returns from your investments and then save accordingly.
To create a disciplined saving habit:
If you choose long-term plans with regular ULIP premium payments, you can also inculcate the habit of regular savings. These regular savings, coupled with the compounding of returns, can help you amass a decent corpus with time.
For financial security :
After marriage, you get the financial responsibility of your spouse. If one of the spouses passes away, the other suffers a financial loss. This financial loss can be taken care of with a ULIP plan. The insurance cover offered under the plan helps you provide financial security to your spouse in your absence.
To enjoy tax benefits:
Lastly, ULIPs allow newlyweds to lower their individual and collective tax liability with the tax benefits that they offer. The premiums paid for ULIPs are allowed as a deduction under Section 80C. The limit is up to Rs.1.5 lakhs.
So, if both spouses are working and each of them invest in a ULIP plan, they can lower their tax liabilities. This will also lower the family's overall tax liability and help them enhance their disposable income. A higher disposable income can go towards supplementing their savings too.
Benefits of ULIPs for newlyweds:
Besides the aforementioned reasons, here are other benefits of ULIPs that newlyweds can get if they invest in the plan –
Range of investment funds
ULIPs offer different types of funds to suit the risk profile of every investor. You can choose from a range of equity, debt or balanced funds and invest your ULIP premium as you deem fit.
Furthermore, as the financial market changes, ULIPs also offer you the flexibility of changing investment funds through switching. You can switch between the available funds anytime during the policy tenure to ensure that your investment matches your strategy, always. What’s more, the amount switched does not even attract any tax. So, redeem your debt fund and invest in equity or move your equity investments into debt without incurring any taxation.
The flexibility of managing the investment
ULIPs are very flexible plans that allow you to manage your investments as you want. Besides switching, you can make partial withdrawals to get liquidity in challenging times. Then, there is the option of top-up, wherein you can pay additional premiums to enhance your investments.
Professional fund management
The funds offered by ULIPs consist of a diversified portfolio of securities that is managed by expert fund managers. As such, you can get the benefit of expert fund management so that you can earn the possible returns on investments.
The bottom line
Newlyweds need to step up their savings to match their enhanced financial needs. In this objective, a ULIP plan can come to their aid. With the multiple benefits that ULIPs provide and their relevance, they can be a suitable choice for newlyweds.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale.
